transcript: Speaker A: Don't skip ahead here. Skip ahead here to your dream school with the Duolingo English Test. Get your language score in just two days at one-third the cost of other tests, and complete your college application before the deadline, in less time, with less stress. Take a free practice test online today and start your journey abroad!
on_screen_text:

summary: The ad encourages students to use the Duolingo English Test to fast-track their applications to dream universities. It highlights benefits like quick results, lower costs, and wide acceptance. The call to action prompts viewers to take a free online practice test.
